title: Create the largest number
description: Arranges digits to make the largest possible number. All numbers are within 1000.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Arrange the digits $2,4,$ and $9$ to create the greatest possible three-digit number.**

[[☃ sorter 1]]
hints:
We want to put the largest digit in the highest place value. 

Which digit is the largest?

$\maroonD9$ is the largest digit, and we want to put it in the position with the highest place value.   

So $\maroonD9$ will be in the hundreds place: 
 $\maroonD{9}~\_~\_$.

Now we need to do the same thing with the next largest digit:  $\blueE4$.  

So $\blueE4$ goes in the tens place:  

$\maroonD{9}~\blueE4~\_$

The smallest digit is the $\purpleD2$.  The  $\purpleD2$ goes in the ones place:  

$\maroonD{9}\blueE4\purpleD2$
The greatest possible number we can make is $\maroonD{9}\blueE4\purpleD2$.

Now we need to do the same thing with the next largest digit:  $\blueE1$.  

So $\blueE1$ goes in the tens place:  

$\maroonD{7}~\blueE1~\_$

The smallest digit is the $\purpleD0$.  The  $\purpleD0$ goes in the ones place:  

$\maroonD{7}\blueE1\purpleD0$
The greatest possible number we can make is $\maroonD{7}\blueE1\purpleD0$.
